use: COMMON/global setup вАФ clone dancinlab/sidecar вЖТ ~/.sidecar/cli + a sidecar wrapper on ~/.local/bin + global hooks (idempotent). NOT a per-repo scaffold (that's init). curl one-liner: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dancinlab/sidecar/main/scripts/install.sh | bash

scaffold THIS repo: config + .harness rules + gitignore + wrapper (hooks are GLOBAL-ONLY вЖТ sidecar install) (strict by default: block-everything + branch protection + pre-push verify + single-doc scaffolds)

scaffold the lumen/rtsc/carbon-capture sibling-repo "lab" skeleton into a target repo: src/ ¬Ј state/ ¬Ј ARCHITECTURE.json + architecture.html viewer + serve.py ¬Ј CLAUDE/README/CHANGELOG ¬Ј HYPOTHESES/ (pre-registerвЖТfalsifyвЖТrunвЖТverdict) ¬Ј tool/<slug>.py shared harness (tokenized templates/lab/ ¬Ј never-clobber-unless --force)
remove sidecar-injected files (config/.harness/hooks/wrapper); keeps user content
bump .harness-engine submodule to latest (adopt new engine features) + optional hook refresh
merge sidecar hooks into the GLOBAL ~/.claude/settings.json (per-repo --repo is banned вЖТ double-inject)

wire sidecar into the Pi coding agent вАФ symlink the bridge extension (pi/sidecar.ts) into ~/.pi/agent/extensions/ + add ~/.claude/skills to Pi settings. Same engine as the CC plugin; governance parity (Stop-gates CC-only)
git-pull the sidecar CLI clone this binary runs from (e.g. ~/.sidecar/cli) to latest main
mirror sidecar's own commands/ into ~/.claude/commands/ as bare /cmd delegators (marker-tracked ¬Ј regenerable ¬Ј --force heals pre-marker stale shadows from source)

SIDECAR-REPO ONLY вАФ propagate sidecar's OWN change across its install surfaces: inject-bloat guard (context-rot) вЖТ pr-cycle вЖТ self-update (global CLI) вЖТ shadow (slash mirror). Other repos use pr-cycle for a plain verified merge

UserPromptSubmit  вАФ keyword triggers + prompt hints
always-on cross-project governance SSOT (config/commons.md; repo override .harness/commons.md)

surface repo-root ARCHITECTURE.json/.md (design SSOT) at SessionStart; search <q> = substring over id/name/role/detail вЖТ matching node ids+breadcrumb; lint = c4 tree hygiene + id presence/uniqueness; convergence {list|add|rm|edit} = мЮђл∞ЬнХЩмКµ store CRUD (id-keyed ¬Ј add upsert ¬Ј value/threshold '--value -'=stdin); convergence stop-check = Stop нЫЕ вАФ мЧРмЭім†ДнКЄ мґЬл†•мЭШ мЮђл∞Ь-мЛ†нШЄ нВ§мЫМлУЬ мК§мЇФ вЖТ SSOT кЄ∞л°Э лДЫмІА(мЛ†нШЄл≥Д мДЄмЕШлЛє 1нЪМ ¬Ј advisory ¬Ј нМ®нДі=config/convergence-triggers.json); gate-stop-check = Stop нЫЕ вАФ мґЬл†•мЭШ к≤МмЭінКЄ/verdict мЛ†нШЄ к∞РмІА мЛЬ `рЯФђ GATE` лІИмї§ мЧЖмЬЉл©і block вЖТ ARCHITECTURE.json мЭШ нХілЛє `type:\"gate\"` лЕЄлУЬ verdict л•Љ мІБм†С update-in-place мЬ†лПД(мЮРлПЩ store мХДлЛШ ¬Ј нМ®нДі=config/gate-signals.json); result = DISCARDED (мЛ§нЧШ verdict лКФ л≥ДлПД store мХДлЛШ вЖТ ARCHITECTURE type:\"gate\" лЕЄлУЬ verdict мІБм†С update-in-place ¬Ј gate-stop-check к∞Хм†Ь)

append-only history as CHANGELOG.jsonl (newest-first JSONL ¬Ј ts+title+body) вАФ add appends(body via stdin) + auto-trims to keep-N(config lint.changelog.keep, default 30), prune deletes old entries(keep-N or age), autoprune = SessionStart-wired trim to keep-N (silent under cap ¬Ј history stays in git), render = markdown view, migrate = one-shot CHANGELOG.mdвЖТ.jsonl. The CHANGELOG-MISSING gate now wants CHANGELOG.jsonl staged
SessionStart: warn when HEAD is BEHIND origin/<default> (stale-branch trap вАФ reading pre-merge code as current)
re-inject repo-root CLAUDE.md (project rules) EACH UserPromptSubmit so they stay enforced (optional <!-- enforce:start/end --> block)
command catalog (SSOT = this HELP) вАФ inject surfaces the WHOLE command surface at SessionStart so an agent knows every cmd; check gates TOOLKIT.jsonl drift

sibling-CLI command surface вАФ inject runs each configured neighbour CLI's catalog (config `companions` + ~/.sidecar/companions.json ¬Ј DOMAIN-AGNOSTIC, e.g. hexa) at SessionStart so the agent knows `hexa cloud` exists without probing
language prefs (3 axes) + UserPromptSubmit inject
easy friendly-response style вАФ inject (lang from prefs) ¬Ј scaffold = empty 7-element round skeleton ¬Ј lint = advisory axis score (no LLM)

session-scoped toggle вАФ when ON, per-turn inject splits work: DESIGN/ANALYSIS delegated to Fable 5 via 'sidecar fable', IMPLEMENTATION done locally (scope: repo .harness > host ~/.sidecar; default host-wide ¬Ј OFF emits nothing)
per-turn macOS resource readout (CPU load + RAM pressure/used% + swap, вЪ†пЄП on danger) вАФ UserPromptSubmit inject
4-axis rubric + default mode (repo .harness > global ~/.sidecar > present; fixed axis = auto-pick)

Stop gate вАФ blocks a reply that PUNTS the work: defers to a future session ('лЛ§мЭМ мДЄмЕШмЧРвА¶'/'next session', tail-precise) OR reports live 'мЮФмЧђ' (leftover work, negation-aware) вАФ so the agent finishes now; single-fire (stop_hook_active), genuine blocker passes on re-stop (session-terminal)
plan-first runbook вАФ resolver-first mode ¬Ј chat-form л™®нШЄмД±вЖТ0 ¬Ј plan.md handoff + auto-QA 4мґХ + 9-section dossier
all-bg-go вАФ fan out prior-turn branches as parallel background Agents (runbook)
all-fg-go вАФ run prior-turn branches sequentially in-session (runbook)
perpetual multi-lane orchestrator (runbook + roster)
research-driven frontier lab (research-gateвЖТimplementвЖТmeasureвЖТSSOTвЖТre-research; walls measured + reopenable)
abstraction-driven layer dive (census LAWSвЖТpeel to shared trade-off/meta-lawвЖТinvent escapeвЖТcast as falsifiable prediction; meta-laws reopenable ¬Ј d6 honest)

full-stack campaign вАФ ALL 3 phases in order per frontier (researchвЖТimplementвЖТabstractвЖТfalsify ¬Ј implement NEVER skipped, weak lever still measures a wall before abstract) ¬Ј SEQUENTIAL by default (afg-style; pass 'parallel' to fan out) ¬Ј cheap implement auto, only paid gates (c14)
push branch вЖТ open PR вЖТ self-merge (squash¬Јadmin¬Јdelete-branch) вЖТ reap stale open PRs (--no-reap skips)
drain stale open PRs: merge MERGEABLE (no-admin) ¬Ј refresh-merge CONFLICTING (doc-files auto-resolved, code conflicts abort) ¬Ј вЙ•7d code-conflict PRs closed with branch preserved ¬Ј cron-able

one-shot auto-poll via hexa cloud (aliveвЖТutil/probeвЖТoptional pull+teardown ¬Ј READ-ONLY default ¬Ј pull-then-destroy)
cloud training-job scaffolder (runbook + exports/dojo/<slug>/ emit)
context-driven micro-experiment sweep (infra-gateвЖТbudgetвЖТdispatchвЖТmonitorвЖТabsorbвЖТledger)
anti-punt self-check runbook (proceed on local+reversible; ask only when outward/decision)
continue the most-recently proposed action without re-confirming
iterative ideation rounds until depletion (breadth over selection)
design-architecture program runbook (7-verb spine)

usage: research {arxiv <query|id> [--n N] [--sort relevance|date|updated] | yt <url|id> [lang] | web <query> [--n N] | fetch <url>}
use: arXiv / YouTube transcript / keyless web search (DuckDuckGo) / page fetch (no key)
download (yt-dlp) вЖТ frames (ffmpeg) + transcript (captions/Whisper) for the agent

delegate ONE instruction to the Fable 5 model via headless 'claude -p' (default -m claude-fable-5 ¬Ј prompt from argv words/--file/stdin, sent via child stdin вАФ no argv leak/quoting ¬Ј --json = claude --output-format json ¬Ј --dry = print resolved argv, no run ¬Ј --cwd <dir> ¬Ј --sources <l> = setting sources (default project,local вАФ DROPS the global governance hooks that stall a headless child in a dirty repo; pass user,project,local to inherit the full session env) ¬Ј -c/--continue = continue the most recent conversation in --cwd ¬Ј -r/--resume <id> = resume a session_id from a prior --json run (stateful ¬Ј same --cwd) ¬Ј --timeout <s> = kill a stalled run after s seconds (default OPT-IN cap, default UNLIMITED, exit 124) ¬Ј flags after -- go to claude verbatim) ¬Ј --bg = fire-and-forget (launch detached вЖТ prints a job id, returns now); collect with 'sidecar fable result <id>' (RUNNING=exit3) / 'tail <id>' (follow output live) / 'wait <id> [--timeout s]' / 'list' вАФ no hand-rolled poll loop ¬Ј --write (aliases --bypass/--agent) = grant WRITE/EXECUTE via --permission-mode bypassPermissions (Write/Edit/Bash/git ¬Ј no prompts) so the child can implement; DEFAULT is READ-ONLY (headless can't approve, so writes auto-deny вАФ Read/Grep/Glob only) ¬Ј opus fallback FORBIDDEN (always, not a flag): pins an availableModels allowlist without Opus, so a safety-classifier-flagged request refuses on the delegated model instead of silently re-running on Opus)

usage: imagine <prompt-file> <out.png> [-s size] [-b fal|openai] [-m model] | list | help | history
use: AI image generator (fal/openai ¬Ј keys via secret ¬Ј prompt from FILE ¬Ј canonical sizes)

transactional email via Postmark API (POST /email) вАФ token from `secret get postmark.server_token` (curl -K ¬Ј never in argv) | history [--count N][--offset N][--tag t][--json][--local] | list | help

demiurge-house scientific paper: scaffold (emoji title ¬Ј g5 tier badges ¬Ј TikZ+pgfplots ¬Ј fal.ai cover) вЖТ xelatex+bibtex√Ч3 build вЖТ g51 вЙ•10-page gate publish --to zenodo|arxiv|both [--sandbox][--source]: Zenodo REST lifecycle (DOI) ¬Ј arXiv submission tarball+guide (no API) update (Zenodo new-version) ¬Ј unpublish (delete Zenodo draft) ¬Ј status вАФ keys via `secret get zenodo.token`
staged-L0 + freshness + doc-gate checks
repo-wide non-canonical name audit (version/copy/dup suffix backlog the write-guard never saw) ¬Ј --ing = land summary on THIS repo's board ¬Ј --gate = exit 1 on any hit

enforce ONE canonical hypothesis folder (config hypotheses.dir, default HYPOTHESES/) for pre-register->falsify->run->verdict work. The pre write/bash guards block NEW strays (a configured hypotheses.alias, e.g. anima UNIVERSE, or the built-in hypothes*/к∞АмД§* pattern); check audits the backlog (--gate exits 1), migrate = history-preserving git mv <dir> -> HYPOTHESES/ (merges if it exists), scaffold = create the skeleton, show = active dir + aliases

run configured verification commands in parallel (was verify; config key stays verify.checks) ¬Ј scaffold = emit a .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs 'sidecar ci' on config ci.{runner,setup,fallback,cachePaths} (init writes it too) ¬Ј ci.fallback on = cost-free fast path (self-hosted pool then github-hosted fallback, probe-fail-safe, no Blacksmith) + cachePaths = warm actions/cache
